completed_work: Regenerated docs/self_model/SELF_MODEL.json with two implemented capabilities.
Updated self-model tests for CAP-0002 and VERIFY-20260705-0002.
key_decisions: CAP-0002 records read-only L0 candidate diagnostics as an implemented self-model capability.
VERIFY-20260705-0002 records object-shaped command evidence for the capability registration.
next_actions: Decide whether PLAN-20260705-0001 should be marked completed directly or closed by a new completion warrant edge.
risks: CAP-0002 is diagnostic-only; it does not imply automatic L0 discovery or context selection behavior.
summary_text: The read-only L0 candidate diagnostics implementation is now registered in SELF-MODEL as CAP-0002, with VERIFY-20260705-0002 as its verification artifact. CAP-0002 declares the diagnostic as an implemented capability and evidence-binds the diagnostic module, CLI, and tests. SELF_MODEL.json aggregates CAP-0001 and CAP-0002 as implemented capabilities. Post-commit audit reported ok true with SELF_MODEL_INDEX_SOURCE_RECORDS_CHANGED_CONTENT_CURRENT and SELF_MODEL_INDEX_CONTENT_CURRENT, so no index-refresh commit was needed after 647beec.
